node.text_zh: 以下資訊已更新
node.text_en: The following information has been updated

node.text_zh:
政府宣佈

★ 有關不同組別地區人士的強制檢疫期的措施請參考連結內容。 (詳情)

★ 如食肆所有員工已接種第一劑疫苗，食肆可將整個處所或處所一部分劃作特定範圍；特定範圍內堂食服務可延至午夜 12 時，最多六人同坐一桌，範圍內顧客須使用「安心出行」手機應用程式紀錄到訪情況。 (詳情)

★ 食肆所有員工已完成接種疫苗，即已接種兩劑疫苗並等待 14 天，特定範圍的堂食服務可延至凌晨 2 時，最多八人同坐一桌，顧客數目上限增至處所通常容納人數 75%，宴會人數上限也提升至 100 人；顧客須至少接種一劑疫苗並使用「安心出行」，方可進入該特定範圍。 (詳情)

➦ 任何人進入或身處公眾地方時（不論室內或室外）須一直佩戴口罩。 (詳情)

➦ 違反「限聚令」、 「口罩令」及「強制檢疫令」的罰款為最高 $5,000。 (詳情)

➦ 在公眾地方進行群組聚集的人數放寬至 4 人。 (詳情)

➦ 晚上十時至上午五時禁止堂食。堂食時間內不得多於四人一桌、入座率最高五成。 (詳情)

➦ 餐飲業務及特定處所負責人須為其員工安排每 14 日進行一次檢測。 (詳情)
node.text_en:
Government announcements

★ Please refer to the link for varying compulsory quarantine periods for people in specified areas. (Details)

★ If all employees have received first vaccine doses, catering premises may arrange specific areas with service hours extended up to midnight and a maximum of 6 people allowed per table. All customers in that area must register their entry with the "LeaveHomeSafe" app. (Details)

★ If all employees have received the second vaccine doses for more than 14 days, catering premises may arrange specific areas with service hours extended up to 2 a.m. with a maximum of 8 people allowed per table. Seating capacity for the entire establishment is relaxed to 75% of its original capacity. All customers in that area must have already received at least first vaccine doses and register their entry with the "LeaveHomeSafe" app. (Details)

➦ A mask must be worn by anyone present in or entering public places (both indoors and outdoors). (Details)

➦ The maximum penalty for violation of regulations regarding gathering, mask-wearing, and compulsory quarantine has increased to $5,000. (Details)

➦ The maximum limit imposed on any group gathering in public places is relaxed to four persons. (Details)

➦ No dine-in services can be provided between 10pm and 5am. During the hours of dine-in services, no more than four persons can be seated at each table. A cap of 50% is imposed on seating capacity. (Details)

➦ Persons responsible for catering business premises and specified premises are required to arrange testing for their employees every 14 days. (Details)

node.text_zh:
需接受強制檢測群組

★ 此項資料隨時更新，最新資料及詳情，請參考政府網頁。 (詳情)

★ 最後更新：2021 年 5 月 22 日

未有大廈需要強制檢疫
node.text_en:
Persons Subject to Compulsory Testing

★ NB the information shall be updated at any time. For most up-to-date information and details, please refer to relevant government webpages. (Details)

★ Last Update: 2021-5-22

At present, no building has been order for compulsory testing

node.text_zh:
病理檢測結果須知

➦ 參與衛生署轄下檢測計劃的市民，若檢測結果為陰性，則只有在樣本瓶及化驗表格上印有條碼的情況下，方會在遞交樣本後的三天內收到電話短訊通知

➦ 參與醫管局轄下「加強化驗室監察計劃」，或經由急症室、普通科門診送交檢測樣本的市民，若檢測結果為陰性，則最快於翌日（由遞交樣本日起計）收到電話短訊通知檢測結果

➦ 若檢測結果為陽性，不論經由衛生署，或醫院管理局轄下診所及急症室遞交檢測樣本，均會由衛生防護中心致電跟進，及安排病人入院接受隔離治療

★ 此項資料將隨時更新，最新資訊及詳情，請向衛生署及衛生防護中心查詢
node.text_en:
Guidance notes on specimen testing

➦ Testing programme under Department of Health – SMS notifications on negative results will be made within three days of specimen submission only when barcodes are present on both the speciman bottle and request form.

➦ 'Enhanced Laboratory Surveillance Programme' under Hospital Authority or specimen submissions through Accident and Emergency Departments (AEDs) or General Out-patient Clinics (GOPCs) – SMS notifications on negative results will be made, at the soonest, the day after speciman submission.

➦ If a positive test result is returned from any specimen (whether submitted through Department of Health or Hospital Authority), Centre for Health Protection will be responsible for follow-up phone calls and arrangement for hospital isolation treatment.

★ The information above shall be updated at any time; most up-to-date information and details can be obtained from Department of Health and Centre for Health Protection.

node.text_zh:
受規管業務及處所 (詳情)

處所負責人須為其員工安排每 14 日進行一次檢測及要求顧客進入處所前使用「安心出行」應用程式記錄行蹤或登記個人資料。            公眾及私人泳池可在遵守一系列感染控制措施後可重新開放。            戲院、表演場地及兩個主題公園的入場人數上限，提升至該處所容納量的75%。            宗教活動參與人數不可多於場地可容納人數的三成，而在活動進行期間不得飲食。            符合疫苗氣泡規定的酒吧或酒館、浴室、派對房間、夜店或夜總會、卡拉OK場所及麻將天九耍樂處所可重新開業。
node.text_en:
Businesses and premises under regulations (Details)

Persons responsible for catering business premises and specific premises are required to arrange testing for their employees every 14 days, and require that their customers track their visits using the 'Leave Home Safe' app, or register their personal contact information.            Public and private swimming pools can be reopened on condition of compliance to a series of infection control measures.             The maximum number of admissions for theatres, performance venues, and the two theme parks have been increased to 75% of respective premise capacity.             The number of participants in religious activities should not exceed 30% of venue capacity, and no food or drink is allowed during the activities.            bars or pubs, clubs or nightclubs, bathhouses, party rooms, karaoke establishments and mahjong-tin kau premises can resume operation if they can fulfil the requirements under the "vaccine bubble"

node.text_zh: 舉報違反檢疫令情況：
node.text_en: Report suspected cases of quarantine order breaches:
